title: ColorSaturation
body: # ColorSaturation ![Compact Powered by OneConfig](https://polyfrost.org/img/compact_vector.svg) ![Dev Workflow Status](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Polyfrost/ColorSaturation.svg?style=for-the-badge&color=1452cc&label=release) A simple color saturation mod. ## Features - Toggle on / off - Change saturation intensity
